title: Smoky Blissful Duck Breast
description: A sweet and savory dish featuring smoky duck breast, with a side of blissfully tender vegetables.
instructions: Rinse the duck breast and pat it dry with a paper towel.
Mix together smoky paprika, brown sugar, rice vinegar, and sesame oil in a small bowl.
Rub the mixture all over the duck breast, making sure to coat it evenly.
Place the duck breast on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the duck reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the duck is cooking, peel and chop the bliss sweet potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
Place the sweet potatoes on a separate baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with a little bit of oil and toss to coat.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender and lightly browned.
While the sweet potatoes are cooking, trim the green beans and place them on a separate baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with a little bit of oil and toss to coat.
Roast in the preheated oven for 10-15 minutes, or until the green beans are tender and lightly browned.
Once the duck is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Serve the sliced duck breast with the roasted sweet potatoes and green beans on the side.
